findings.evidence_summary: No local security policy file was found in the packaged artifact.

findings.evidence_summary: Extension creates a webview in src/features/interactiveWebview.js without a detected Content-Security-Policy meta tag.
findings.recommendation: Add a strict Content-Security-Policy meta tag to every webview HTML document, scoping script-src/style-src to the webview's own origin and the webview.cspSource.

findings.evidence_summary: Extension performs network requests. Not malicious by itself.

posture.reason: IDE/client posture has 1 failure metric(s) and 10 warning metric(s).
posture.recommendation: Fix failure metrics first, then warnings that increase execution or agent autonomy.

posture.reason: VS Code local configuration was found.
Workspace Trust is enabled with normal prompts and no broad trusted paths found.
posture.recommendation: Enable Workspace Trust, keep prompts active, and remove broad trusted paths such as home, Downloads, Desktop, or filesystem roots.

posture.reason: Automatic tasks are not globally enabled.
posture.recommendation: Set task.allowAutomaticTasks to off unless you have strong workspace trust hygiene.

posture.reason: Global agent tool auto-approval is disabled or agent mode is disabled.
posture.recommendation: Disable global auto-approval so tool, terminal, URL, and workspace actions require explicit confirmation.

posture.reason: No custom terminal auto-approval rules found.
posture.recommendation: Keep terminal auto-approval empty or strictly read-only; never ignore the built-in deny rules for destructive commands.

posture.reason: URL auto-approval has custom rules; review scope.
posture.recommendation: Keep URL auto-approval empty or limited to explicit internal hosts; avoid wildcards and public domains.

posture.reason: No extension trust overrides found.
posture.recommendation: Remove extension trust overrides unless each extension has been explicitly reviewed for Restricted Mode safety.
